text.title: ES Aggregate Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping aggregate workload to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the aggregate need event sourcing (full audit + replay) or just events for notification?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: use ddd-domain-events on a state-stored aggregate

branch.question: Concurrent writes to the same stream expected?

conclusion.verdict: ES aggregate with mandatory expected_version + retry strategy in command handler

text.example: needs_es=true → concurrency=low → replay_slow=false → ES aggregate with apply-only mutation, expected_version on save, collect_pending after save.
